## Agent Submission

- Name: <!-- required -->
- Slug: <!-- required; kebab-case -->
- Category: agents
- GitHub URL: <!-- optional -->
- Docs URL: <!-- optional -->
- Author: <!-- optional -->
- Contact email: <!-- required -->
- Tags (comma-separated): <!-- optional -->

## Required Fields

- Description (1-3 sentences): <!-- required -->
- Card description (short preview): <!-- required -->
- Full copyable agent prompt/config: <!-- required -->

## Optional Fields

- Install / usage:
- Caveats / constraints:
- Repo URL (if different from GitHub URL):

## Validation Notes

- Do not include fake counters or popularity metrics.
- Keep prompt/config fully usable without missing context.
